content:
# Zonal Isolation

**Summary**: The physical separation of different geological zones to prevent fluid migration.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] evaluated the ability of fiber-reinforced cement to provide zonal isolation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017]] Crucial for preventing cross-flow and protecting the wellbore from pressure fluctuations.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- thickening-time-test
- fluid-loss-test

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Fiber inclusion was shown to improve zonal isolation in several cited studies. ([[2017-ahmed|Ahmed, 2017, p. 53]])
